title: Europe Has a ‘Guns vs. Butter’ Problem. War in Iran Makes It Worse.
summary_full: After decades of prioritizing domestic over military spending, the continent’s leaders are trying to pivot. That is straining national budgets and could anger voters.
summary_public: After decades of prioritizing domestic over military spending, the continent’s leaders are trying to pivot. That is straining national budgets and could anger voters.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: War in Iran Makes It Worse.
